events.notes: Genesis block minted 1,000,000,000 NEAR; initial circulating supply was ~35% (~350M NEAR) at launch with remainder subject to vesting.
Community grants & ecosystem fund allocation (10% of genesis supply) available at launch for ecosystem development.
Operations grants (12% of genesis supply) allocated at launch for protocol operations and early contributors.
Early backers/investors (17.94% of genesis) subject to 12-month cliff from October 2020, then linear vesting over 24 months; cliff tranche released ~Oct 2021.
Core team allocation (14% of genesis) subject to 12-month cliff from October 2020, then linear vesting over 24 months; cliff tranche released ~Oct 2021.
Remaining investor linear vesting fully completed by approximately October 2022 (24 months post-cliff).
Remaining core team linear vesting fully completed by approximately October 2022 (24 months post-cliff).
Ongoing staking inflation at ~5% annually (net ~4.5% after 30% of fees burned); no end date, continuous emission to validators and delegators.

summary: NEAR Protocol's major vesting events — covering investors (17.94%), core team (14%), and foundation/operations allocations — were structured around a 12-month cliff from the October 2020 genesis followed by 24-month linear vesting, meaning virtually all time-locked genesis supply was fully unlocked by October 2022. As of mid-2025, there are no significant remaining scheduled unlock cliffs from the original distribution; the only ongoing token emission is staking inflation (~5% gross annually), which continuously increases circulating supply. Unlock pressure from vesting is therefore minimal at this stage, with any supply-side pressure coming solely from staking rewards.
caveats: 1) Exact monthly linear vesting tranches between Oct 2021–Oct 2022 are not broken out here because tokenunlocks.app does not provide a free detailed NEAR schedule as of mid-2025, and Messari's precise vesting table requires a Pro subscription. 2) The investor/team token figures above are approximate based on the published percentage allocations applied to 1B genesis supply — the actual on-chain monthly release amounts may differ slightly. 3) Some secondary allocations (e.g., specific ecosystem fund sub-grants, NEAR Foundation treasury re-allocations post-2022) are not publicly documented with precise unlock dates on free-tier sources. 4) The NEAR Foundation has made discretionary treasury deployments (e.g., the 2022 USN stabilization fund) that are NOT reflected here as they were not pre-scheduled vesting events. Source: https://near.org/blog/near-token-supply-and-distribution/ and https://docs.near.org/concepts/basics/tokens
